title: vvp: how to `push` into an instance in a `generate` block?
code_blocks:
$ iverilog -o test_gen_push.o ../../bench/test_gen_push.v && vvp -i test_gen_push.o
VCD info: dumpfile test_gen_push.vcd opened for output.

> push test_gen_push_tb

param   : INSTANCES
reg     : rstn
generate: forgen[0]
generate: forgen[1]
generate: forgen[2]
generate: forgen[3]
generate: forgen[4]
module  : ref_clk_gen
net     : ref_clk
net     : out_clk
net     : clk2[4:0]
net     : clk[4:0]
